title: T-038 — Matrix Publish Modal (matrix_publish_modal)
prompt:
# T-038 — Matrix Publish Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §17.1 PLE-013, §8.1 SCR-07-02 §4.7
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:380-412 (`matrix_publish_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:582-592
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog [Save & Publish] showing summary of changes (cells modified count, per-line override delta), version notes textarea, warning that runs in-progress are unaffected; confirm creates new active version.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixPublishModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog).
2. Summary card with delta counts + version notes Textarea (stored in changeover_matrix_versions.notes).
3. Confirm calls T-018 POST endpoint; on success → emits scheduler.changeover_matrix.updated outbox via T-029.
4. Warning Alert: 'Runs in progress will continue to use the previous version.'.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixPublishModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/MatrixPublishModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 5 cells modified + 1 line override added, when MatrixPublishModal opens, then summary shows '5 cells modified, 1 override added' and version notes Textarea is empty
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:380-412, then it has same summary card layout, same warning Alert, same notes Textarea, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Card, Alert, Textarea, Button) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given user clicks [Publish], when API succeeds, then scheduler.changeover_matrix.updated outbox event was emitted (assertion via test spy on emitter)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/MatrixPublishModal.test.tsx covering summary + parity + outbox emission spy
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/MatrixPublishModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip outbox emission (audit trail mandatory)
- Do not auto-version on every cell edit (only on Publish action)
- Do not allow publishing with empty notes if change count >5 cells (warn user)

pipeline_inputs.description: Publish Dialog with delta summary, version notes, in-progress runs warning, outbox emission.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-side version_number = MAX+1 (no client computation per FR-07-PLE-013-01). Confirm triggers T-018 POST + T-029 emitter.
out_of_scope: Do not implement matrix editor here (T-036)
Do not compute version_number on client
